channel.title: ProtoQuiz Blog
channel.description: EMS study strategies, app updates, and stories from providers using ProtoQuiz

item.title: I Built ProtoQuiz for Paramedic School. It's Time to Run It at Your Agency.
item.description: ProtoQuiz started as the tool I needed to get through paramedic school. It worked. I've extended it for agencies — your protocols, your providers, your dashboard. Two pilot slots open.

item.title: Why We Made ProtoQuiz Fully Free
item.description: Every feature in ProtoQuiz is now free for everyone. Here's why we switched to an ad-supported model — and why it's actually more sustainable for the long run.

item.title: How to Study EMS Protocols: A Practical Guide for Medics
item.description: A practical EMS protocol study guide covering active recall, spaced repetition, and scenario-based practice. Stop re-reading PDFs and start retaining what matters.

item.title: Spaced Repetition for EMS: How to Remember Protocols Long-Term
item.description: Learn how spaced repetition and the SM-2 algorithm help EMS providers retain medication dosing, contraindications, and treatment algorithms between shifts.

item.title: EMS Pharmacology Study Guide: How to Actually Remember Your Drug Box
item.description: A practical EMS pharmacology study guide covering how to organize, memorize, and quiz yourself on dozens of EMS medications. Includes the 9 things you need to know about every drug and real examples like Adenosine and Ketamine.

item.title: EMS Training Compliance: What Training Officers Actually Need
item.description: Most EMS agencies track training in spreadsheets or not at all. Here is what training officers actually need for compliance: per-provider analytics, mandatory assignments, audit-ready exports, and proactive gap identification.

item.title: ProtoQuiz 2.0: Significant Upgrades Across the Board
item.description: The biggest update since launch, with meaningful improvements to extraction quality, scenario generation, and overall reliability.

item.title: ProtoQuiz's First Month: From Uploads to Algorithm Quizzes
item.description: A look at ProtoQuiz's first month, the challenges faced, the progress made, and the valuable community feedback that's shaping its future.

item.title: Master Your EMS Protocols with ProtoQuiz
item.description: Juggling multiple EMS agencies? ProtoQuiz makes learning and retaining different protocols easy. Upload your PDF and start quizzing!
